headline: GE Aerospace investing $55 million in Limestone County plant
summary: Mar. 10—GE Aerospace will invest $55 million into a site in the Huntsville portion of Limestone County. The announcement came Monday, along with news that it will invest $1 billion total in its manufacturing sites across the country in 2026. "GE Aerospace's $55 million investment is a strong vote of confidence in our workforce and our community," said Limestone County Economic Development ...

headline: Elon Musk's xAI wins permit to build power plant in Mississippi despite pollution concerns

headline: GE Aerospace to invest about $15 million in Terre Haute plant
summary: GE Aerospace on Monday announced it plans to invest about $15 million at its Terre Haute plant. That investment will go toward new machining, tooling and inspection equipment, along with targeted facility upgrades, the company said. The local investment is part of a $1 billion overall investment in its U.S. manufacturing sites and suppliers in 2026, including about $65 million across Indiana, ...
